channel.title: California on really.lol
channel.description: Recent content in California on really.lol

item.title: Mountains like bedsheets 🏔🌙
item.description: This is a photo post, which means you aren't going to be able to see it in the RSS feed. I haven't worked out how to reliably show images in the RSS feed, so you'll have to go the website itself. Sorry! I promise this isn't a growth hack! I'm just bad at this!

item.title: You know the devil from the Jamiroquai 'Feels Just Like It Should' video? Major vibes from this skating guy in a suit. 👹👔
item.description: This is a photo post, which means you aren't going to be able to see it in the RSS feed. I haven't worked out how to reliably show images in the RSS feed, so you'll have to go the website itself. Sorry! I promise this isn't a growth hack! I'm just bad at this!

item.title: In an exciting turn of events, we're going to be at an Oscar party all afternoon and evening today. 💪
